subcodes.first_line: O ye twin luminous stars in the heaven of the love of God, at all times supplicate and entreat the Kingdom of Beauty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای فرقدان دو کوکب نورانی سماء محبت الله در کل حین تضرع و ابتهال بملکوت جمال
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @firmness in the Covenant, @consolation and comfort
